name: Authentication & Session
description: Prevents auth bypass, session fixation, and credential exposure
concernStatement: preventing authentication bypass, session fixation, insecure token storage, and credential exposure

name: Authorization & Access Control
description: Enforces ownership checks, RLS, and privilege boundaries
concernStatement: enforcing authorization checks, row-level security, ownership validation, and privilege separation

name: Input Validation & Sanitization
description: Prevents injection, path traversal, and malformed input exploitation
concernStatement: preventing injection attacks, path traversal, prototype pollution, and malformed input exploitation

name: Secrets & Credentials
description: Prevents API key leakage, hardcoded credentials, and client bundle exposure
concernStatement: preventing credential leakage, hardcoded secrets, and sensitive value exposure in client bundles or logs

name: Dependency & Supply Chain
description: Enforces package pinning, audit hygiene, and transitive dep safety
concernStatement: maintaining dependency hygiene, pinning package versions, and preventing compromised transitive dependencies

name: Data Privacy & Compliance
description: Governs PII handling, encryption at rest, and GDPR-pattern compliance
concernStatement: protecting personal data, enforcing encryption at rest, and preventing PII leakage in logs or responses

name: API Security & Rate Limiting
description: Prevents abuse via throttling, CORS, versioning, and endpoint authentication
concernStatement: preventing API abuse, enforcing rate limits, securing CORS policy, and authenticating all endpoints

name: Database Hardening
description: Enforces RLS, connection pooling, backup hygiene, and column-level encryption
concernStatement: enforcing row-level security, connection pooling, backup strategies, and preventing plaintext sensitive columns

name: Infrastructure & Deployment
description: Governs CI/CD secret hygiene, IAM least-privilege, and environment isolation
concernStatement: preventing secret exposure in CI/CD, enforcing least-privilege IAM, and maintaining environment isolation

name: Caching & CDN
description: Prevents cache poisoning, stale auth data, and CDN security header bypass
concernStatement: preventing cache poisoning, ensuring stale auth data is not served, and enforcing CDN security header policy

name: Frontend & Network Security
description: Enforces CSP, HTTPS-only cookies, SRI, and clickjacking defenses
concernStatement: enforcing Content Security Policy, HTTPS-only cookies, subresource integrity, and anti-clickjacking headers

name: Observability & Incident Response
description: Enforces log hygiene, alerting, audit trails, and error boundary patterns
concernStatement: ensuring clean log hygiene, anomaly alerting, audit trail coverage, and proper error boundary instrumentation

name: Resilience & Recovery
description: Governs backup strategy, failover, AZ distribution, and runbook coverage
concernStatement: enforcing backup strategies, failover configuration, multi-AZ distribution, and runbook documentation

name: AI & LLM Safety
description: Defends against prompt injection, raw LLM output rendering, and context leakage
concernStatement: preventing prompt injection, validating LLM outputs before rendering, and preventing context window leakage

name: Code Quality & Patterns
description: Enforces error handling, null safety, and patterns that prevent vulnerability entry points
concernStatement: maintaining error handling hygiene, null safety, and structural patterns that prevent vulnerability entry
